command: docker image inspect netbox-mcp-server:latest >/dev/null 2>&1 || docker build -t netbox-mcp-server:latest https://github.com/netboxlabs/netbox-mcp-server.git; exec docker run --rm -i -e NETBOX_URL -e NETBOX_TOKEN netbox-mcp-server:latest

missing=""; for bin in git npm node; do command -v "$bin" >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing="${missing:+$missing }$bin"; done; if [ -n "$missing" ]; then msg="gravwell-prod launcher missing dependencies: $missing"; printf "%s\n" "$msg" >&2; exit 127; fi; repo="/tmp/mcporter/gravwell-prod"; url="git@gitlab.com:hydrahost-developers/infrastructure/repositories/gravwell-mcp.git"; runtime_rev="$repo/.mcp-runtime-rev"; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$repo")"; if [ ! -d "$repo/.git" ]; then git clone --depth 1 --single-branch --filter=blob:none "$url" "$repo" >/dev/null 2>&1; else git -C "$repo" pull --ff-only --quiet >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; head="$(git -C "$repo" rev-parse HEAD)"; installed=""; [ -f "$runtime_rev" ] && installed="$(cat "$runtime_rev")"; if [ ! -f "$repo/build/index.js" ]; then npm --prefix "$repo" ci --no-audit --no-fund --quiet >/dev/null 2>&1; npm --prefix "$repo" run build >/dev/null 2>&1; printf "%s" "$head" > "$runtime_rev"; elif [ ! -d "$repo/node_modules" ] || [ "$head" != "$installed" ]; then npm --prefix "$repo" ci --omit=dev --no-audit --no-fund --quiet >/dev/null 2>&1; printf "%s" "$head" > "$runtime_rev"; fi; exec node "$repo/build/index.js"
